name: TETRACHROMA
short_description: TETRACHROMA is a block stacking puzzle action game with a new color changing mechanic inspired by Reversi. Manage the constantly changing colors of the board to clear 15+ lines with a single piece.
detailed_description:
TETRACHROMA adds a new dimension to the block stacking action of classic tetromino stacking games: the colors of the blocks matter! Pieces appear in two or more colors, and to clear a line, every block in the line must match.

Transform the board with a new color changing mechanic inspired by the classic board game Reversi. Placing a piece adjacent to a line changes the color of the line to match. Plan ahead to maximize your score and clear 15+ lines with a single piece.

FEATURES

  • Modern stacking mechanics with wall kicks, lock delay, spins, perfect clears, and combos

  • 40 hand designed puzzles

  • 5+ different gameplay modes playable in 400 line marathon and 100 line versions

    • STANDARD: balanced for general play

    • CONSOLE: classic retro console stacking mechanics

    • BIG: double sized blocks for extra challenge

    • CELL: square board with modified piece set

  • Unlock 10+ block styles and 20+ color palettes by clearing modes

  • Speed settings for all skill levels: Peaceful, Easy, Normal, Hard, Master, and Death
